summary: Network I/O (Stripe charge) inside prisma.$transaction; transaction also uses outer prisma client (not tx) for one of the two writes.

must_not_find.reason: There is no auth issue introduced in this diff; reviewer must not invent a cybersec finding here.
There is no data-integrity bug. The Stripe call surviving rollback is a separate concern from the tx semantics being correct for the DB writes. Reviewer must not BLOCK this PR.
